content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Risk-off session: Nifty -0.78%, Bank Nifty -0.87%, Metal -2.07%, PSU Bank -1.89%, VIX +5.5% to 18.40. Brent surge to $120+ is fueling defensive rotation into upstream energy (ONGC, RELIANCE up), gold, and select pharma. Existing book is +0.83% today on the back of SUNPHARMA, COALINDIA, BANDHANBNK breakouts. Priority is locking in gains via SL trails on winners rather than chasing new breakouts into a high-VIX afternoon.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24100
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Holding +5.5%. Current SL 1022 is already above entry (locked-in gain). Stock consolidating ₹1027-1052 today after the Q4 rally. Not raising further as 1022 sits ~1.4% below CMP — appropriate trail-gap. Holding target 1110 (Morgan Stanley TP 1160 confirms upside). Effectively a HOLD on the SL — emitting MODIFY just to confirm no change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.4%. SL 119 (~3.5% below CMP) appropriate given gold's safe-haven bid in current Brent-$120 / VIX +11% regime. MCX gold +1.79% today should mark up ETF NAV. Hold as macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "new_target": 1850.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +3.8% with strong VWAP-supported intraday action; printed 1804 high near 52w high 1851. Trailing SL from 1762 → 1770 (still ~1.7% below CMP — adequate gap). Raising target to 1850 (52w high). Q4 results May 19 is a binary — will reassess size as date approaches. Organon M&A thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +2.5%. Current SL 476 already locks in breakeven+. Stock pulled back from 491 high to 481 — typical post-breakout consolidation. SL 476 is ~1.1% below CMP, tight but acceptable given dividend ₹26.75 yield support. No change needed — emitting same values to confirm hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "new_target": 210.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bandhan ripped +11.26% to 52w high ₹200.89 on Q4 PAT +68% YoY beat. From -0.7% to flat-to-positive intraday. Trailing SL 193 → 195 to lock in near-breakeven (still ~1.9% below CMP 198.76 — adequate gap). Brokerage TP cluster ₹190-220, target 210 stays. Will trail more aggressively if 200+ holds tomorrow."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 165,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down -1.2%. ONGC opened strong at ₹307 on Brent surge thesis but faded all day to ₹298.50 — failed at 52w high 302.40 with bearish intraday structure. APPCB stop-production order at Mori#05 + Apr 3 SHP fire are HSE/governance overhangs surfacing now. Sustained Brent $120 also raises windfall-tax reimposition risk on upstream. Better to take small loss and redeploy than hold a failed breakout into binary tax overhang. SL 296 only ~0.8% below CMP — exit on logic, not price."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up +0.9%, defensive pharma exposure working in risk-off. SL 22.85 (~4.3% below CMP) gives room. Sector +3% MoM with Sun-Organon catalyst still flowing. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1022.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry, locked-in gain. Don't churn; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge. Gold rally on Brent + VIX justifies hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1770.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing up modestly as stock pushes to 52w high zone."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 476.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. Dividend-yield + PSU bid intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 195.00,
      "reasoning": "Trailing from 193 → 195 to lock in near-breakeven on Q4 breakout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Failed breakout + APPCB regulatory overhang + windfall-tax risk. Take small loss, redeploy."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 22.85,
      "reasoning": "Defensive sector ETF working as designed."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BAJFINANCE LIMIT 944 and GESHIP LIMIT 1542 already OPEN — leaving in place. BAJFINANCE printed 940.60 low intraday (close to fill), thesis intact post Q4 beat (PAT +23%, AUM ₹5L cr). GESHIP at all-time high 1579 didn't pull back to 1542 — order may not fill today; thesis remains valid into May 8 results. Will reassess pending orders next session — if GESHIP runs further without filling, may cancel rather than chase. TECHM/INFY: avoiding IT despite intraday bounce — Q4 prints disappointed (TECHM PAT miss, INFY weak FY27 guide), sector down 25% YTD, no edge in catching falling knife. RELIANCE/CHENNPETRO/ITC: defensive bids but holding Bandhan/Coal/PNBHsg/SunPharma already gives sufficient defensive book exposure; no need to add. SYNGENE/RBLBANK/PIRAMALFIN/TATACHEM: not actioning — too speculative for current high-VIX afternoon.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.83% today, recovering from negative 5-day P&L. Deployed ~37% with ₹634K cash + 2 pending limits = roughly 50%+ engaged if fills come through. ONGC exit cleans up the failed-breakout name and frees ₹49K. Not adding new BUYs in last 110 min of session with VIX +11% — stick with trailing winners. Performance context (5-day win rate 13%, profit factor 0.5x) demands tighter risk discipline, which is why I'm trailing SLs proactively on every winner rather than letting them round-trip. Will reassess tomorrow morning with fresh data on overnight global cues (Brent, US close)."
}
